property.name: description
property.value: An Angel doll. When Susie and Noelle come in basement, to progress, the SOUL must move to Christmas tree, being covered by the Angel doll.

property.name: description
property.value: A red guitar. Upon interacting, narration will notices there's a code taped to the inside ,labeled "SHELTER." . Checking the pass code will cause Kris removes their [[SOUL]] after [[player]] read the first 3 numbers, "122".

property.name: description
property.value: Susie and Noelle notice the noise and enter Dess's room. Deciding waiting for the next noise, they sit down nearby Dess's bed.

property.name: description
property.value: While [[Noelle Holiday|Noelle]] and [[Susie]] talk and wait for any loud noise, [[Kris Dreemurr|Kris]] attacks the [[SOUL]] to keep it away from the guitar. They stops attacking SOUL and becomes tired after all dialogues are done.

property.name: description
property.value: The [[SOUL]] is threw to here by [[Kris]].

properties.property: In the [[route|normal route]], after catching the [[SOUL]] again, [[Kris]] will walk to piano and begin playing [[Hidden_music_tracks#Kris's_piano_songs|song]]s. In the [[wierd route]], without Kris's presence, the SOUL can play the piano itself, but only make noise.

In the normal [[route]], when passing bathroom, [[Asgore]] can be seen cleaning the toilet. After a while, he walked away. In the [[wired route]], with tinnitus, Kris heavily throws the [[SOUL]] to the bin after re-equiping the [[Thorn Ring]] to [[Noelle]].

property.name: description
property.value: After leaving the bathroom, [[Asgore]] appears in Carol's room to look at the corkboard.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Noelle]] is talking to [[Kris]] what happened ''last night'', including they removing a thorn on her hand. However, during the conversation, the [[SOUL]] re-enters Kris's body, controls them again and force them re-equip the [[thorn|Thorn Ring]] to Noelle, as [[Hidden_music_tracks#sinedrone_danger_high|sinedrone_danger_high]] plays.

property.name: description
property.value: Upon removing the gift box and reaching the switch, the power will be cut off, which causes [[Susie]] and [[Noelle]] deciding to go to the basement.

properties.property: ''(You could barely see it. A patch of sunlight that shouldn't be there.)'' ''(It felt different in your hand. And you knew what it was.)'' '''[first interactionwith any SAVE point in the Light World]'''

Noelle's computer. When Noelle is not in party, Kris can check cycling wallpapers of it. The descriptions are respectively: *''Noelle's family in the snow.'' *''Noelle's family looking festive.'' *''Noelle's family edited to be elves.'' *''a motion-blurred photo of you as a kid.'' *''Dess holding a cracked baseball bat.'' *''a picture of a far-off, snowy city.'' *''Noelle and Dess at the pageant as kids.'' *''some green dog puppet thing.''

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa. Making noise upon interacting.

properties.property: A Santa with dead batteries. Making lower and slower noise upon interacting. '''[Noelle]'''(There wouldn't be so many Santas with dead batteries...) '''[Noelle]'''(If Kris hadn't glued the cases shut trying to "starve them"...)

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa. Making noise upon interacting.

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa with dead batteries. Making lower and slower noise upon touching.

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa with dead batteries. Making lower and slower noise upon touching.

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa. Making noise upon touching.

property.name: description
property.value: A holiday treat catcher,which can automatically catching the [[SOUL]].
